title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at ICICI Direct - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at ICICI Direct - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, ICICI Direct in Nagpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About ICICI Direct:
ICICI Direct is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Direct!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
